usage: add_tap_walls [-help] [-bottom] -cell <cellName> [-layer <layer_name>] [-left] [-orientation {R0 MX MY R180}] [-pitch <float>] [-prefix <prefix>] [-range <lx ux>|<ly uy>] [-right] [-top] [-y_flip_side {left right both}]

options.name: -bottom
options.description: Specifies add tap-wall cell on bottom side

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specify layer name to check rule check.

options.name: -left
options.description: Specifies add tap-wall cell on left side

options.name: -orientation
options.description: Specify orientation of added tap-wall cells

options.name: -pitch
options.description: Distance from the center of one tap-wall cell to the center of the following wall-tap cell (unit:um)

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Prefix of tap-wall cells to inserted.

options.name: -range
options.description: Specify {lx, lx} or {ly uy} as the start/end point at the user given side

options.name: -right
options.description: Specifies add tap-wall cell on right side

options.name: -top
options.description: Specifies add tap-wall cell on top side

options.name: -y_flip_side
options.description: Specify orientation of added tap-wall cells
